caption: The video features a man seated at a desk in what appears to be a podcast or radio studio setting. He is wearing a white cap, headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed on it. The man is holding a smartphone in one hand and a CD case in the other, suggesting he might be discussing or reviewing the content of the CD. He speaks into a microphone, indicating that he is recording or broadcasting. The background includes a banner with the text "UNIQUE HUSTLE" and stars, as well as a screen displaying "Where BOSSES Talk!" The overall atmosphere suggests a professional yet casual discussion or interview format.
